CustomDataType.description: This class does not get 'AdditionalProperties = false' in the schema generation, so it can be extended with arbitrary JSON properties to allow adding custom data.

ChargingRateUnitEnumType.description: The unit of measure Limit is expressed in.

GenericStatusEnumType.description: The Charging Station will indicate if it was able to process the request

ChargingSchedulePeriodType.description:
Charging_ Schedule_ Period
urn:x-oca:ocpp:uid:2:233257
Charging schedule period structure defines a time period in a charging schedule.

startPeriod.description: Start of the period, in seconds from the start of schedule.

limit.description: Charging rate limit during the schedule period.

numberPhases.description: Number of phases that can be used for charging.

evseId.description:
The ID of the EVSE for which the
schedule is requested. When evseid=0, the
Charging Station calculated the expected
consumption for the grid connection.

duration.description: Duration of the schedule in seconds.

scheduleStart.description:
Composite_ Schedule. Start. Date_ Time
urn:x-oca:ocpp:uid:1:569456
Date and time at which the schedule becomes active. All time measurements within the schedule are relative to this timestamp.

StatusInfoType.description: Element providing more information about the status.

reasonCode.description: A predefined code for the reason why the status is returned in this response. The string is case-insensitive.

additionalInfo.description: Additional text to provide detailed information.
